---
id: cache-list
title: "List the key-value cache items belonging to an app"
description: "List all the available cache items that the builds of the app created via the save-cache step."
sidebar_label: "List the key-value cache items belonging to an app"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List the key-value cache items belonging to an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/cache-items"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all the available cache items that the builds of the app created via the save-cache step.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
